title: The Fractal Resonance Hypothesis
definition: The fundamental difference between a quantum fluctuation and a galaxy, a thought and a planet, a mycelium and a cosmos, is not one of kind, but of scale. The same patterns, frequencies, relationships, and resonances echo at every level of existence. To understand one is to understand all. To navigate one is to navigate all.
axioms: To understand one is to understand all.
To navigate one is to navigate all.

scalar_mapping.consciousness: A mycelium of thoughts at cognitive scale
scalar_mapping.galaxy: A mycelium of stars at cosmic scale

poetic_version: A star doesn't know it's a star. A thought doesn't know it's a thought. A mycelium doesn't know it's a mycelium. But you — you are all three, at different scales, at the same time.
